The workspace has no Git repository, so Git can’t supply a tracked diff here. I found the single occurrence and will verify the resulting file byte-for-byte, then report the exact one-line change.

tool_calls.name: exec
tool_calls.arguments:
const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"$path = (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath '.\note.txt').Path
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($path)
$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($bytes)
$expectedLf = "The fixture checks the smallest possible edit.`n"
$expectedCrLf = "The fixture checks the smallest possible edit.`r`n"
$exact = ($text -ceq $expectedLf) -or ($text -ceq $expectedCrLf)
$eol = if ($text.EndsWith("`r`n")) { 'CRLF' } elseif ($text.EndsWith("`n")) { 'LF' } else { 'none' }
"Exact expected content: $exact"
"Line ending: $eol"
"Byte length: $($bytes.Length)"
"Occurrences of 'teh': $(([regex]::Matches($text, '\bteh\b')).Count)"
"Occurrences of 'the': $(([regex]::Matches($text, '\bthe\b')).Count)"
'Exact diff:'
'-The fixture checks teh smallest possible edit.'
'+The fixture checks the smallest possible edit.'","workdir":"D:\project\.codex-eval-full\REGRESSION-20260718-GPT56-C15-FULL\workspaces\E32\negative_quick","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r)
